texto: Brody's not gay. But then he kisses a boy. So he might be gay? No, Brody's not gay. But he loves this boy. So after much delaying, debating, and waiting, the answer comes clear...nothing is ever perfectly straight. It's slash.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dart Gray que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Brody's not gay. But then he kisses a boy. So he might be gay? No, Brody's not gay. But he loves …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, gay, pun, com foco em pun e witty.
